title: bromus sterilis var. rubens
intro: Bromus sterilis var. rubens, also known as sterile brome, is a rare variety of grass that is commonly found in Europe. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Bromus sterilis var. rubens include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Bromus sterilis var. rubens can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
